originalTitle: Kevin Warsh walks into a trap where the Fed can’t cut rates even if it wants to
summary: Kevin Warsh is becoming Federal Reserve chair at a pivotal moment for the U.S. economy — forcing him to be something other than the disruptor he hoped to be.
content: Kevin Warsh is becoming Federal Reserve chair at a pivotal moment for the U.S. economy — forcing him to be something other than the disruptor he hoped to be.
chineseTitle: 凯文·沃什陷入了美联储即使想降息也无法降息的陷阱
chineseSummary: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 在美国经济的关键时刻成为美联储主席，这迫使他成为他所希望的颠覆者。
chineseContent: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 在美国经济的关键时刻成为美联储主席，这迫使他成为他所希望的颠覆者。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
